summary: Tested P3 Task: Event/Activity Attendance display on user profiles. Backend API (GET /api/users/{user_id}/attendance) returns 200 with correct structure. Frontend displays 'Attending' section when user has attendance data. View public profile button fix verified - no more /user/undefined navigation.

issues: Attending section properly styled with calendar/ticket icons, good spacing and contrast

tests: Returns proper structure with activities and events arrays
Shows activities created by user (creator_id match)
Shows activities where user has 'going' status
Activity response includes title, date, time fields

view_public_profile_fix.notes: Button is now conditionally rendered only when user?.user_id exists. URL navigates to /user/{actual_user_id} instead of /user/undefined

attending_section_ui.notes: Section displays when user has attendance data (activities or events). Shows activity title, date, and time. Shows event title, date, and business/artist name.

empty_state_handling.notes: Attending section correctly hidden when user has no attendance data

critical_code_review_comments: Attendance API correctly queries activities where user is creator OR has 'going' status in invites
Events shown are from businesses owned by the user - consider adding event RSVP feature in future
Frontend conditionally renders Attending section: (attendance.activities.length > 0 || attendance.events.length > 0)
View public profile button guard: {user?.user_id && (...)} prevents undefined navigation
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test activity (TEST_UI_Attendance_Activity) for UI verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: P3 attendance feature fully implemented and tested. Backend API GET /api/users/{user_id}/attendance working. Frontend displays Attending section with activities (title, date, time) and events (title, date, business name). View public profile button fix also verified - conditional rendering prevents /user/undefined issue from iteration_3.

view_public_profile_fixed.original_issue: Button navigated to /user/undefined when user_id not populated in auth context
view_public_profile_fixed.fix_applied: Conditional rendering: {user?.user_id && (...)} ensures button only renders when user_id exists
